violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw beef) were observed stored above raw fish in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw fish. Staff moved the raw beef and placed it on bottom shelf away from the fish during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023

The food prep sink is adjacent to the hand-washing sink. A splash guard shall be installed to prevent exposure of splash to the food prep sink from handwashing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Hand-washing sink is adjacent to food prep sink. A splash guard shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The 3 bay sink is lacking a drainboard. Drainboard shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
